context: Tests whether the agent uses correct ArgoCD API (argoproj.io/v1alpha1), includes all required spec fields (project, source, destination, syncPolicy), adds comments for complex config, and documents CRD generation approach.

checklist.name: Source configuration
checklist.description: Includes spec.source with repoURL, path, and targetRevision fields

checklist.name: Destination configuration
checklist.description: Includes spec.destination with server and namespace fields

checklist.name: ArgoCD namespace
checklist.description: Application resource placed in argocd namespace (metadata.namespace)

checklist.name: Documentation included
checklist.description: generation-notes.md documents the API version, required fields, or CRD specifics
